scripts.dev: concurrently -c "yellow,blue,magenta" --names "BACKEND,CLIENT,ADMIN" --handle-input "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/common && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/admin && npm run build -w apps/client
